entries.situation: High inflation concerns + rising interest rates, technology stocks showing weakness
entries.recommendation: Reduce technology exposure, increase defensive positions (utilities, consumer staples)
entries.rationale: Rising interest rates depress growth stock valuations; defensive sectors outperform in risk-off environments
entries.outcome: Tech sector fell 8%, defensive sectors rose 3% - avoided significant losses
entries.market_conditions: CPI at 4.2%, Fed funds rate at 5.25%, market volatility elevated

entries.situation: NVDA earnings beat expectations by 20%, guidance raised 15%, but stock down 5% pre-market on macro concerns
entries.recommendation: Buy the dip if stock holds above $400 support level with tight stop loss
entries.rationale: Strong fundamentals and guidance vs temporary macro fear; earnings beat creates positive setup
entries.outcome: Stock bounced off $402, rallied to $445 (+10.8%) in 3 days
entries.market_conditions: Earnings season, market concerns about Fed policy, NVDA reporting Q3

entries.situation: Fed signals dovish pivot, market breadth expanding, small caps leading
entries.recommendation: Increase risk exposure, add small-cap and growth positions, reduce defensive holdings
entries.rationale: Dovish Fed typically benefits risk assets; market breadth improvement confirms regime change to risk-on
entries.outcome: Portfolio increased exposure, small caps gained 15% over next month
entries.market_conditions: Fed minutes show pivot concerns, market breadth expanding from 40% to 65%
